title: Robin Nears Enies Lobby
description: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Spandam, Blueno, Nico Robin, Usopp, Sanji. The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: Right now, he's retrieving nice Nico Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: .......we should get away from here, quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You're hiding, isn't there......!!? We don't care...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Nico Robin won't break her promise..

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: was a young nice Nico Robin.

summary: The threat of Enies Lobby and the Gate of Justice becomes real as Robin and Franky are dragged deeper into World Government territory.
